description_long: This shotgun features a classic design with a wooden full stock and fore-end, both finished in a polished brown wood grain. The receiver and barrel are constructed from dark metal, with the barrel extending to a medium length and featuring a ventilated rib along the top for improved aiming. The pump-action fore-end is ribbed for grip and is positioned beneath the barrel, indicating a manual cycling mechanism. The trigger guard is rounded and proportionally sized, enclosing a single trigger. The overall build is robust, with a smooth transition between the wooden and metal components. The shotgun's finish is a mix of glossy wood and matte metal, giving it a traditional yet functional appearance.
description: A classic pump-action shotgun with a polished wooden stock and fore-end, dark metal receiver, and a ribbed barrel. The design is robust and traditional, with a rounded trigger guard and ribbed pump grip.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the wooden stock, ribbed pump fore-end, and the dark metal barrel with a ventilated rib.
description_view_1: Front-on view displaying the circular barrel opening, ribbed pump grip below, and the alignment of the wooden and metal components.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the first, with clear visibility of the wooden stock, pump fore-end, and the full length of the barrel.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the butt of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel and pump, with the trigger guard partially visible.
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves
